findings.issue: Server-side filename generation for path isolation
findings.evidence_span: target.md: upload.py: content signature and extension are both checked; server_filename is generated; audit_log_retention_days is 90.
findings.recommended_fix: Ensure server_filename continues to be generated using a secure, isolated directory path to prevent path traversal.

findings.issue: Content signature and extension validation present
findings.evidence_span: target.md: upload.py: content signature and extension are both checked; server_filename is generated; audit_log_retention_days is 90.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain both content signature (magic bytes) and extension checks to prevent type spoofing and ensure file type integrity.

findings.issue: Audit log retention configured to 90 days
findings.evidence_span: target.md: upload.py: content signature and extension are both checked; server_filename is generated; audit_log_retention_days is 90.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify that audit logs are retained for the specified period (90 days) and that retention duration meets compliance requirements.
